summary: VenuLoQ iteration 86 - New features testing: Back buttons, Profile page, WhatsApp share, Quick Preview modal all working correctly

login_back_button.details: Back button (data-testid='login-back-btn') visible at position x=16, y=16 in top-left dark section

register_back_button.details: Back button (data-testid='register-back-btn') visible at position x=16, y=16 in top-left dark section

profile_api_endpoint.details: PUT /api/auth/profile endpoint updates name and phone for authenticated users. Tested with democustomer@venulock.in

profile_page_mobile.details: Profile page (/profile) loads for logged-in customer, shows name/phone fields (data-testid='profile-name', 'profile-phone'), save button (data-testid='profile-save-btn'), back button (data-testid='profile-back-btn')

profile_page_desktop.details: Desktop profile page shows name/phone inputs (data-testid='profile-name-desktop', 'profile-phone-desktop'), save/back buttons

profile_page_save.details: Profile page save updates the user's name via API. Tested changing name from 'Demo Customer' to 'Test Updated Name' - reflected immediately

header_desktop_dropdown_profile.details: Desktop dropdown menu includes 'My Profile' link (data-testid='nav-profile') - verified on /favorites page

header_mobile_menu_profile.details: Mobile menu includes 'My Profile' link (data-testid='mobile-menu-profile-link') - verified on /partner page

mobile_venue_card_share_icon.details: Mobile venue cards on /venues/search have share icon (data-testid^='venue-card-share-'). Found 20 share icons on page

mobile_venue_card_preview_icon.details: Mobile venue cards have quick preview eye icon (data-testid^='venue-card-preview-'). Found 20 preview icons on page

quick_preview_modal.details: Quick preview modal (data-testid='mobile-quick-preview') opens when clicking eye icon. Shows venue image, rating, name, location, type, capacity, amenities, price, and View Details button (data-testid='quick-preview-view-btn')

login_flow.details: Login with democustomer@venulock.in / password123 works, redirects to /my-enquiries

context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features working: 1) Login/Register pages have back buttons in top-left dark section, 2) Profile page works on both mobile (custom dark header) and desktop (uses Header component) with name/phone editing and save functionality, 3) Header component (used on /favorites, /partner etc) has 'My Profile' link in both desktop dropdown and mobile menu, 4) Mobile venue cards on /venues/search have Share2 and Eye icons, 5) Quick preview bottom sheet modal opens on eye icon click with venue details and View Details CTA. Note: Header component mobile menu works on /favorites, /partner pages - landing and search pages have their own custom headers.
